name: socialforge
description: Open-source agency-grade social media production engine — calendar parsing, asset-first compositing (brand assets are sacred, AI is the creative layer around them), AI image generation (Vertex AI Nano Banana Pro), AI video generation (WaveSpeed Kling v3.0 Pro), multi-platform copy adaptation (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, Threads, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts), human-in-the-loop review galleries, and C2PA content provenance signing for EU AI Act Article 50 compliance (applicable 2 Aug 2026). **16 skills, 25 commands, 5 agents, 22 scripts, 10 HTTP MCP connectors, 0 global hooks.** Four creative modes (ANCHOR_COMPOSE / ENHANCE_EXTEND / STYLE_REFERENCED / PURE_CREATIVE). **Installs on Claude Code (CLI + IDE extensions), Anthropic Cowork, OpenAI Codex (CLI + IDE + App), and Google Antigravity 2.0 (CLI + IDE)** — single source repo, single skills/ directory shared via the Agent Skills open standard. v1.9.0 (2026-05-27): real native manifests for Codex (.codex-plugin/plugin.json with the published OpenAI schema) + Antigravity (gemini-extension.json at repo root, per Google's data-agent-kit-starter-pack reference pattern). Replaces the v1.7-v1.8 era invented manifests that were correctly removed in v1.8.5. v1.6.0 added end-to-end-tested C2PA content provenance signing (75-byte test PNG → ~43 KB signed PNG with manifest_embedded_and_verified=true). May 2026 channel pack: TikTok USDS post-Jan 2026, LinkedIn March 2026 algorithm + Depth Score, Apple MPP, YouTube AI labeling, Sora deprecation → defaults to Runway Gen-4 / Veo 3.x / Kling 3.0. All 10 HTTP MCP connectors are Cowork-compatible. MIT-licensed, free, no telemetry. Built and maintained by Indranil Banerjee (https://indranil.in). Part of the Neelverse Marketing Suite alongside Digital Marketing Pro and ContentForge. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py): image / video / vision model ids resolved via aliases; deprecated ids auto-fall-forward; --model and --video-model flags accept any registered id. See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
